decision: Preserve DRB source addresses for Greek Daniel additions rather than forcing DRB Bel and the Dragon into the 42-row NRSV/KJV/NABRE semantic grid.
reason: The project standard is correct text at the correct book/chapter/verse address.
DRB Daniel 13:65 is an Astyages/Cyrus transition row in the DRB source and must remain addressable as DRB Daniel 13:65.
DRB Daniel 14:42 is a closing declaration by the king in the DRB source and must remain addressable as DRB Daniel 14:42.

Mapping DRB Daniel 13:65 to active Daniel 14:1 and DRB Daniel 14:1-41 to active Daniel 14:2-42 would make active DRB Daniel 14:42 display DRB source Daniel 14:41, which violates source-address correctness.
NRSV/KJV/NABRE may remain absent at Daniel 13:65 because those source forms end Susanna at Daniel 13:64.

prayer_song.mappingRule: DRB Daniel 3:n maps to active Daniel 3:n for 24-90

susanna.mappingRule: DRB Daniel 13:n maps to active Daniel 13:n for 1-65; active Daniel 13:65 is DRB-only

bel_and_dragon.mappingRule: DRB Daniel 14:n maps to active Daniel 14:n for 1-42

allowedAbsence: NRSV absent at active Daniel 13:65 unless an approved NRSV source provides that address.
KJV absent at active Daniel 13:65 because bound KJV Susanna has 64 rows.
NABRE absent at active Daniel 13:65 because bound NABRE Susanna has 64 rows.
nextRequiredWork: Add a bounded repair script to add/populate DRB addition lanes under source-address policy.
Run exact DRB addition collation audit after repair.
Record DRB additions result if exact collation passes.
